title: Clear End City
description: This pack makes the great experience in end city must try and feel the most top level experience awaits you
body:
Clear End City is a data-driven world generation mod by Dark_PixelForge (mod ID: cec, version 1.0.0) that transforms the End dimension into a cinematic, lore-rich landscape. It adds 13 new structures built entirely from vanilla blocks — no new items, no custom mobs, compatible with any modpack.
Compatibility: Fabric, Quilt, and NeoForge/Forge. Requires the Moogs Structures library (v1.1.0+). Targets pack format 34 (Minecraft 1.21.x).
Structures
Major Landmarks
Mega Citadel — the centrepiece, a large multi-wing fortress that spawns only on End Highlands with a minimum distance of 1000 blocks from world origin (rare, spacing 90 chunks)
Void Fortress — a labyrinthine dungeon with procedurally assembled corridors, guard chambers, a throne chamber, and a vault
Ender Sanctum — an ancient ritual structure
Towers & Spires
Nebula Tower — comes in short and tall variants
Crystal Spire — three variants: lone, tall, and cluster
Shrines & Monuments
Echo Shrine — intact and ruined variants, tied to Enderman lore
Obsidian Monolith — three size variants
Abyssal Beacon — dormant and active variants
Starfall Ruin — small, medium, and large variants
Ambient / Decorative
Void Garden — chorus flora spreads in small, medium, and large patches
Ancient End Ruins — scattered debris in four designs
Ender Geodes — three variants
Void Crystals — four decorative crystal formations
All structures spawn across all End biomes (The End, End Highlands, End Midlands, End Barrens, Small End Islands).
Loot
Four tiered loot tables scale with structure difficulty:
Common — basic End supplies
Uncommon — gear and resources
Rare — enchanted diamond armour & weapons, elytra, shulker shells, netherite scrap, enchanted golden apples, end crystals
Mega Citadel Treasure — the best loot pool: netherite ingots, elytra, enchanted golden apples, full diamond gear, shulker shells, crying obsidian
